methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs with a small set of company objectives, linked source objectives, explicit ownership, and measurable key results.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe customer and business outcomes, not feature delivery.
Key results measure meaningful movement on customer or business KPIs.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams so accountability is explicit.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q3 Deepen cross-format engagement and monetization
companyObjectives.statement: Build stronger compounding value between music, podcasts, video, and audiobooks across the platform.

objectives.title: 2026-Q3 Cross-format engagement goal
objectives.objective: Increase cross-format discovery and monetization without raising listener confusion or rights complexity.

keyResults.statement: Increase the share of listeners consuming more than one content format weekly.
